column1: # mapping_set_title: CVE to CWE LinkML schema mappings
#   Element-level mappings between the lmodel CVE schema (https://w3id.org/lmodel/cve)
#   and the lmodel CWE schema (https://w3id.org/lmodel/cwe). Captures the points
#   where CVE classes/slots reference, classify, or enrich MITRE Common Weakness

column7: A CVE ProblemType identifies a CWE weakness type via the embedded cwe_id; CWE Weakness is the canonical record for that classification.
Per-language description of a CWE classification attached to a CVE.
Identical class name and intent in both schemas - external taxonomy linkage by name and version.
CVE TaxonomyRelation expresses a relation across taxonomies; CWE Relationship models the same kind of cross-entry linkage.
Both model an external URL/document reference attached to a vulnerability or weakness record.
Slot value is a CWE identifier; resolves to a Weakness record on the CWE side.
Free-text problem description sourced from CWE Name/title.
